author: hollowstrawberry
description: Logs users joining, leaving, and moving between voice channels inside the voice channel chat.
install_msg: Load it with `[p]load voicelog`, then enable it with `[p]voicelog enable`. Use `[p]voicelog` to review or adjust the current settings.
short: Logs voice joins, leaves, and moves in VC chat.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store user data.
